Package neqsim.process.chemistry.rca

Class Symptom

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.chemistry.rca.Symptom
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class Symptom extends Object implements Serializable
Symptom describing an observed problem in well, flow assurance or process operation.

A symptom carries a category, a free-text description, optional numeric measurements (deposit mass, temperature, pH, corrosion rate, etc.), and a confidence score. The RootCauseAnalyser uses these symptoms together with chemistry / process context to rank candidate root causes.

Version:
1.0
Author:
ESOL
